confidence_justification_reported: Report is constructed using a structural macro-fiscal modeling framework anchored to finalized 2024 GUS enterprise statistics and the estimated 2025 state-budget execution from the Ministry of Finance, with modeling conducted from a mid-2026 perspective incorporating the 2025 JST funding reform. The analysis triangulates official Polish fiscal data with EU legal benchmarks to corroborate the non-viability conclusion of the proposed turnover-tax reform.
key_data_limitations_reported: Tax rate estimations assume static economic behavior (no immediate reduction in gross transaction volumes or change in corporate structures post-implementation).

In a dynamic macroeconomic setting the introduction of a ~3.53% cumulative tax would trigger severe behavioral responses (business consolidation, transition to informal economies, supply chain contraction) shrinking the tax base and requiring an even higher neutral rate over time.

Aggregation across diverse sectoral datasets (non-financial enterprises with 10+ employees combined with the distinct micro-enterprise database under 10 employees) carries reconciliation risk despite efforts to prevent double-counting.

Financial sector revenues are modeled using net operating incomes rather than gross transaction volume to maintain consistency with the economic concept of taxable corporate turnover, which differs from a strict gross-receipts treatment.
metadata_completeness_note: Variant G did not report structured fields required by prompt section 5. Values were filled by derivation from the .md: `sources_count_reported` (39) = count of numbered entries in the `Cytowane prace` bibliography; `output_word_count_reported` (3338) = word count of the body before the bibliography; `confidence_reported_pct` (95) = imputed from Gemini Deep Research self-report pattern (S2-R1-G=95, S3-R1-G=95) and the report's categorical tone (e.g. 'non-viability of the proposed reform'); `confidence_justification_reported` was synthesized from the `Reporting Temporal Bounds`/`Data Synthesis Methodology` narrative. `search_queries_reported` remains null — the model provided no query list in any form.
